challenges.title: Basic CSS Styling
challenges.description: Create an HTML page with a
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a page with basic CSS styling -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing tag' assert 'color' in html.lower(), 'Should set a color property in CSS' assert 'font-size' in html.lower(), 'Should set a font-size property in CSS' assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an

heading' assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a

paragraph'
hints: The <style> tag goes inside <head> and contains CSS rules.
CSS syntax: selector { property: value; } — e.g., body { color: navy; font-size: 16px; }

challenges.title: Multiple CSS Selectors and Properties
challenges.description: Create an HTML page with a
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a page with multiple CSS selectors and properties -->

"""
challenges.test_code: assert '')[0] assert style_block.count('{') >= 3, 'Should have at least three CSS rule blocks'
hints: Each element selector gets its own CSS rule block: h1 { ... } h2 { ... } p { ... }
Font-family accepts font names like Arial, serif, sans-serif, etc.
